name: Chinese Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables and fruit in a large bowl.
2. Mix 1/3 cup oil, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, 2 tablespoons rice vinegar, 2 tablespoons sugar, and 1 packet Ramen flavoring in a jar and shake well.
3. Just before serving, break the Ramen noodles into small pieces. Mix with sesame seeds and toss into the salad.
4. At the last minute before serving, pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
